member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.Claim.IdentityClaim`1
member.summary: Base identity claim with provider metadata.
member.typeparam: The type of the primary key for the user associated with the claim.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.Claim.IdentityClaim`1.IsActive
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether the claim is active.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.Claim.IdentityClaim`1.CreateDate
member.summary: Gets or sets timestamp of claim creation.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.Claim.IdentityClaim`1.ModifiedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets timestamp of last modification.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.IdentityRole`1
member.summary: Concrete identity role with customizable key/>.
member.typeparam: The type of the unique identifier for the role.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.IdentityRole`1.IsActive
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether the role is active.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.IdentityUser`1
member.summary: Concrete identity user with customizable key and person types.
member.typeparam: The type of the primary key for the user.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.IdentityUser`1.ProviderName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the identity provider (e.g., Google, Facebook, Local).

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.IdentityUser`1.IsActive
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether indicates whether the user is active.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.IdentityUser`1.RowVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets used for optimistic concurrency control.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.IdentityUser`1.CreateDate
member.summary: Gets or sets timestamp of user creation.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.IdentityUser`1.ModifiedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets timestamp of last modification.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1
member.summary: Represents a refresh token used for renewing authentication sessions.
member.typeparam: The type of the user identifier.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets surrogate primary key for EF and indexing.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.Token
member.summary: The refresh token string.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets The identifier of the user associated with this token.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.Username
member.summary: The username of the user associated with this token.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.CreatedAt
member.summary: When the token was created.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.ExpiresAt
member.summary: When the token expires.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.RevokedAt
member.summary: When the token was revoked, if applicable.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.IsRevoked
member.summary: Whether the token has been revoked.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.CreatedByIp
member.summary: IP address where the token was created.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.RevokedByIp
member.summary: IP address where the token was revoked.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.ReplacedByToken
member.summary: Token that replaced this one (if rotated).

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.ReasonRevoked
member.summary: Reason for revocation.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken`1.IsActive
member.summary: Convenience property to check if the token is still valid. Not mapped to the database.
